properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're here with the grace of the Saviour With the heart of the Father You're all we need You're here with the hands of the Healer With the power of Your Spirit You're all we need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: At the mention of Your Name Every chain will break I know everything will change Jesus! just the whisper of Your Name Will silence wind and waves At the mention of Your Name!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're here, You're the Provider All I've ever needed Jesus, You supply You're here, with wonder-working power Everything You breathe on Coming back to life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my strength You are my anchor And You never fail You are my hope You will deliver Emmanuel

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are my strength You are my anchor And You never fail You are my hope You will deliver Emmanuel! Emmanuel!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Just the mention, oh (of Your Name) Just the whisper, oh (I know everything will change)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You're just a breath away (Will silence wind and waves) You are (at the mention of Your Name) You're just a breath away
